## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test coverage
- [ ] Build or release

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] Added or updated tests
- [ ] Updated documentation or examples
- [ ] Not applicable

## Compatibility

Describe any public API, behavior, package, or documentation impact.

## Notes for Reviewers

Add context, tradeoffs, or follow-up work.
